title: Rosemoor Home for the Aged holding AGM
description: GEORGE NEWS - Rosemoor Home for the Aged is...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Rosemoor Home for the Aged is holding their annual general meeting on Thursday 28 November at their premises at 2 Attaqua Street, Rosemoor.

It will start at 18:00.


> Only members who are in good standing with the organisation are allowed to participate in all their activities and programmes, including the annual meeting.


New members are to collect application forms from the office on weekdays between 08:00 and 16:00.

Completed forms are to be handed in on or before 25 November.

For more information, contact Sr Charmaine Titus on 044 871 1342 or [email protected].

The dining room at Rosemoor Home for the Aged. Photo: Facebook

Assistance and donations from the public are always welcome and help the home to create a safe space for the seniors.

People wanting to donate or become involved on a voluntary basis to brighten up life for the residents are welcome to contact Sr Titus, the manager, at the above contact details.

Help is always much appreciated.

Staff at the home.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
